About us

LinkShield is designed to keep you safe online by helping you verify any link in seconds.

With smart detection and a clean, simple experience, you can quickly check whether a URL is safe before opening it.

No complications, no technical steps — just paste the link, scan, and get a clear result.

Fast, reliable, and made to give you confidence every time you browse.
